arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs Man City: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest host Man City in the Premier League on Saturday afternoon. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard reborn: The inside story of his second coming at Coventry - thanks to a chat with Pep Guardiola, killing off egos and the shocking revelation at Chelsea that changed his entire managerial style
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE BY IAN LADYMAN: Frank Lampard is sitting behind a small table in a small room and is poking a bit of fun at himself. Superstitions? Yeah, he's had a few.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola's addresses Jack Grealish pub pictures as Man City boss makes admission over player's future
arts.sum: Man City manager Pep Guardiola delivers a clear response to images circulating online of Jack Grealish's day off following the recent FA Cup win over Plymouth Argyle.

arts.ttl: Premier League title race: Why Liverpool, Arne Slot have already beaten Arsenal following Newcastle United, Manchester City wins
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Southampton in the Premier League on Saturday at Anfield and the Merseysiders will likely claim another three points in their quest for the title.

arts.ttl: Nott’m Forest v Man City: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Nott’m Forest v Man City: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola sets his stall out with Man City stars ahead of $1bn Club World Cup
arts.sum: Manchester City manager will tee it up in America and allow his tired players plenty of down-time at FIFA's one billon dollar 32-team tournament

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola's response to Jack Grealish struggles speak volumes about his Man City future
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola refused to talk about photos of Jack Grealish in a north-east club and admits he does not know what the long-term future holds for the 29-year-old England star

arts.ttl: 'People change' - Jack Grealish gets blunt Man City reality from Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola spoke about Jack Grealish and the new signings at the club ahead of Nottingham Forest

arts.ttl: Guardiola will judge Grealish 'on the pitch'
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola says he will not control players' private lives after images of Jack Grealish at a social club were shared on social media.

arts.ttl: MARTIN KEOWN TALKS TACTICS: Savvy Nuno Espirito Santo will set up Nottingham Forest to exploit Man City's counter-attacking problems
arts.sum: MARTIN KEOWN TALKS TACTICS: I cannot praise Nuno Espirito Santo enough for how he is achieving this with a relatively pragmatic approach for which he makes no apologies
